top_signals.title: US consumer inflation breaks above 4% as Iran war raises energy prices - Reuters
top_signals.summary: US consumer inflation breaks above 4% as Iran war raises energy prices  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Energy Prices Drive U.S. Inflation To Three-Year High
top_signals.summary: U.S. inflation climbed above 4% for the first time in three years in May as rising energy costs tied to the Iran war pushed consumer costs sharply higher, with the Consumer Price Index rising 0.5% from April and 4.2% from a year earlier, according to data released Wednesday by the Bureau of Labor Statistics.  The annual rate matched economists’ expectations but marked the highest inflation reading since April 2023 and an acceleration from the 3.8% rate recorded in April. Energy was by far the largest contributor to the increase. The…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oracle Earnings Pose Next Test for Suddenly Shaky AI Stock Rally
top_signals.summary: The rally in artificial intelligence-related stocks is suddenly on shaky footing, and Oracle Corp.’s earnings report after the close represents the group’s next test.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Illegal mining gangs eyed in South Africa massacre that killed 12
top_signals.summary: The attack in a neighbourhood known for illicit gold activity has intensified scrutiny of violent criminal networks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Volatility surge has trader eyeing one 'stable' stock
top_signals.summary: Mike Khouw is looking for a stable, cash-generating business where he can sell volatility instead of buying drama.
